subTopicTitle: The Lonely Londoners (Selvon) — Tanty — Community & remittances

items.prompt: Describe Tanty's role in the community in 'The Lonely Londoners'.
keyPoints: Tanty acts as a mother figure and source of wisdom.
She organizes social gatherings and supports fellow immigrants.
Her character represents the communal spirit among Caribbean immigrants.

items.prompt: What is the significance of remittances in 'The Lonely Londoners'?

Remittances illustrate the financial struggles and sacrifices of the immigrants.
